starterFiles.content:
from models.book_item import BookItem
from services.catalog import catalog_lines

items = [BookItem("Python", "Ana", 2)]
for line in catalog_lines(items):
    print(line)

def catalog_lines(items):
    return [item.label() for item in items]

sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.book_item import BookItem
from services.catalog import catalog_lines, total_fees

items = [BookItem("Python", "Ana", 2), BookItem("SQL", "Ben", 1)]
assert catalog_lines(items) == ["Book: Python by Ana", "Book: SQL by Ben"]
assert total_fees(items) == 6
print("catalog service tests passed")

solutionFiles.content:
from models.book_item import BookItem
from services.catalog import catalog_lines, total_fees

items = [BookItem("Python", "Ana", 2)]
for line in catalog_lines(items):
    print(line)
print(total_fees(items))

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.book_item import BookItem

book = BookItem("Python", "Ana", 2)
assert book.label() == "Book: Python by Ana"
assert book.fee() == 4
print("book tests passed")

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.book_item import BookItem
from models.video_item import VideoItem
from services.catalog import catalog_lines, total_fees

items = [BookItem("Python", "Ana", 2), VideoItem("OOP", 9, 1)]
assert catalog_lines(items) == ["Book: Python by Ana", "Video: OOP (9 min)"]
assert total_fees(items) == 7
print("mixed service tests passed")

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from services.storage import parse_item

book = parse_item("book|Python|Ana|2")
video = parse_item("video|OOP|9|1")
assert book.label() == "Book: Python by Ana"
assert video.label() == "Video: OOP (9 min)"
print("storage tests passed")

from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': '',
    'models/catalog_item.py': 'Y2xhc3MgQ2F0YWxvZ0l0ZW06CiAgICBkZWYgX19pbml0X18oc2VsZiwgdGl0bGUpOgogICAgICAgIHNlbGYudGl0bGUgPSB0aXRsZQoKICAgIGRlZiBmZWUoc2VsZik6CiAgICAgICAgcmFpc2UgTm90SW1wbGVtZW50ZWRFcnJvcigiU3ViY2xhc3NlcyBtdXN0IGltcGxlbWVudCBmZWUiKQo=',
    'models/book_item.py': '',
    'services/catalog.py': 'ZGVmIGNhdGFsb2dfbGluZXMoaXRlbXMpOgogICAgcmV0dXJuIFtpdGVtLmxhYmVsKCkgZm9yIGl0ZW0gaW4gaXRlbXNdCgpkZWYgdG90YWxfZmVlcyhpdGVtcyk6CiAgICByZXR1cm4gc3VtKGl0ZW0uZmVlKCkgZm9yIGl0ZW0gaW4gaXRlbXMpCg==',
    'tests/check_book_item.py': 'aW1wb3J0IHN5cwpzeXMucGF0aC5pbnNlcnQoMCwgIi4iKQoKZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuYm9va19pdGVtIGltcG9ydCBCb29rSXRlbQoKYm9vayA9IEJvb2tJdGVtKCJQeXRob24iLCAiQW5hIiwgMikKYXNzZXJ0IGJvb2subGFiZWwoKSA9PSAiQm9vazogUHl0aG9uIGJ5IEFuYSIKYXNzZXJ0IGJvb2suZmVlKCkgPT0gNApwcmludCgiYm9vayB0ZXN0cyBwYXNzZWQiKQo=',
    'models/video_item.py': '',
    'services/storage.py': '',
    'tests/check_storage.py': '',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
    'services/__init__.py': '',
    'tests/__init__.py': '',
    'data/catalog.txt': 'Ym9va3xQeXRob258QW5hfDIKdmlkZW98T09QfDl8MQo=',
    'README.md': 'IyBDYXRhbG9nIFF1YWxpdHkgUHJvamVjdAoKQSB0ZXN0ZWQgbXVsdGktZmlsZSBPT1AgYXBwIHVzaW5nIGluaGVyaXRhbmNlIGFuZCBwb2x5bW9ycGhpc20uCg==',

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.book_item import BookItem

book = BookItem("Python", "Ana", 2)
assert book.label() == "Book: Python by Ana"
assert book.fee() == 4
print("book tests passed")

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from services.storage import parse_item

book = parse_item("book|Python|Ana|2")
video = parse_item("video|OOP|9|1")
assert book.label() == "Book: Python by Ana"
assert video.label() == "Video: OOP (9 min)"
print("storage tests passed")

video|OOP|9|1

# Catalog Quality Project

A tested multi-file OOP app using inheritance and polymorphism.
